name: Sanquan Food Co., Ltd.
summary: Sanquan Food Co., Ltd. produces and sells frozen food products in China. It offers private kitchen series products; dumplings; children's series products; soup dumplings; pastries; desserts; convenient fast food products; Western food products; and rice products. The company also operates sanquan.com, a B2C online shopping platform. It offers its products under the Sanquan Ling brand name. The company was formerly known as Zhengzhou Sanquan Foods Co., Ltd and changed its name to Sanquan Food Co., Ltd. in July 2013. Sanquan Food Co., Ltd. was founded in 1993 and is based in Zhengzhou, China.
